channel.title: Eudaimonia Feed
channel.description: RSS entries filtered for lasting importance, personal growth, and eudaimonia. Updated 4x daily.

item.title: Deal is reached to end Iran war and Trump orders stop to U.S. naval blockade
item.description:
Details of the deal were not immediately available. Key mediator Pakistan said the signing will be Friday in Switzerland.
[Eudaimonia Filter — Lasting: 10/10 | Growth: 6/10 | Eudaimonia: 8/10 — Ending a major war and naval blockade is extraordinary and will have lasting global geopolitical impact.]
